/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,_tf2.so -o /home/milenavi/catkin_ws/devel/lib/python3/dist-packages/tf2_py/_tf2.so CMakeFiles/tf2_py.dir/src/tf2_py.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/milenavi/catkin_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/noetic/lib: -lpython3.8 /home/milenavi/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libtf2.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librostime.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libcpp_common.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.71.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
